# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM role for cross-account CI/CD access with wildcard trust for AWS Organization accounts

Parameters:
  RoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: CrossAccountCICDRole
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organization ID (e.g., o-xxxxxxxxxx)
  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional ExternalId required for AssumeRole (leave blank to disable)
  MaxSessionDuration:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3600
    MinValue: 900
    MaxValue: 43200

Conditions:
  UseExternalId: !Not [!Equals [!Ref ExternalId, ""]]

Resources:
  CrossAccountCICDRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref RoleName
      MaxSessionDuration: !Ref MaxSessionDuration
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: TrustOrgAccounts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref OrganizationId
              Bool:
                aws:PrincipalIsAWSService: "false"
              ArnLike:
                aws:PrincipalArn:
                  - arn:aws:iam::*:role/*
                  - arn:aws:sts::*:assumed-role/*/*
          - Sid: TrustOrgAccountsWithExternalId
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref OrganizationId
                sts:ExternalId: !If [UseExternalId, !Ref ExternalId, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
              Bool:
                aws:PrincipalIsAWSService: "false"
              ArnLike:
                aws:PrincipalArn:
                  - arn:aws:iam::*:role/*
                  - arn:aws:sts::*:assumed-role/*/*
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: MinimalCICDAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: AllowReadCallerIdentity
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sts:GetCallerIdentity
                Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt CrossAccountCICDRole.Arn
  RoleName:
    Value: !Ref CrossAccountCICDRole
